recommendations.title: Trivisa
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong's three notorious thieves who have never met one another before appear in the same restaurant. This leads to a rumour that they are joining forces to pull off something big before the Handover, though this is not something that any of them.
recommendations.director: Vicky Wong Wai-Kit, Frank Hui, Jevons Au Man-Kit

recommendations.title: Kit Kittredge: An American Girl
recommendations.overview: The Great Depression hits home for nine year old Kit Kittredge when her dad loses his business and leaves to find work. Oscar nominee Abigail Breslin stars as Kit, leading a splendid cast in the first ever "American Girl" theatrical movie. In order t

recommendations.title: SPL 2: A Time for Consequences
recommendations.overview: While undercover officer Kit is taken prisoner by the syndicate, he befriends his keeper and discovers an organ trafficking ring.

recommendations.title: Fallen Angels
recommendations.overview: An assassin goes through obstacles as he attempts to escape his violent lifestyle despite the opposition of his partner, who is secretly attracted to him.

recommendations.title: A Letter to Three Wives
recommendations.overview: A letter is addressed to three wives from their 'best friend', announcing that she's running away with one of their husbands – but she doesn't specify which one.

recommendations.title: High Risk
recommendations.overview: After failing to save his wife from 'The Doctor', Kit Li is working as a bodyguard and secret stunt double for the cowardly martial arts film star Frankie Lane. Frankie attends an exhibition of the crown jewels of Russia at a Hong Kong hotel, and whe

recommendations.title: 3-D Sex and Zen: Extreme Ecstasy
recommendations.overview: A young scholar named Yangsheng who gets married to the beautiful daughter of a local merchant. When their sex life proves unsatisfactory, Yangsheng leaves home and journeys to the Pavilion of Ultimate Bliss.

recommendations.title: Election 2
recommendations.overview: As election time nears, current Triad chairman Lok faces competition from his godsons. At the same time, Jimmy looks to increase his business relations with mainland China.

recommendations.title: Spoiler Alert
recommendations.overview: Journalist Michael Ausiello embarks on a rollercoaster ride of emotions when Kit Cowan, his partner of 14 years, is diagnosed with terminal cancer.

recommendations.title: Secretariat
